Class BudgetCycle

java.lang.Object
com.fakkaflow.data.model.BudgetCycle
public class BudgetCycle extends Object
Represents a budget cycle for a user. Defines the total allowance and the time range for budgeting.

  • Constructor Details

    • BudgetCycle

      public BudgetCycle()
      Default constructor.

    • BudgetCycle

      public BudgetCycle(int userId, float totalAllowance, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Creates a new budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      userId - ID of the user
      totalAllowance - total budget for the cycle
      startDate - start date of the cycle
      endDate - end date of the cycle
